# Curated Corners — llms.txt (Static Fallback)

> Curated Corners is a luxury interior design and homedecor editorial blog. We publish in-depth articles on neuro-architecture, dark aesthetic spaces, minimalist gaming setups, feminine room aesthetics, men's room design, and curated product recommendations for modern homes.

## Site Information
- Name: Curated Corners
- URL: https://curatedcorners.devxyn.com
- Language: English
- Type: Interior Design & Homedecor Blog

## Machine-Readable Data
- JSON Feed (real-time, auto-updates with every new article): https://curatedcorners.devxyn.com/feed.json
- XML Sitemap (full page index): https://curatedcorners.devxyn.com/sitemap.xml

## Pages
- Home: https://curatedcorners.devxyn.com/
- Shop The Aesthetic: https://curatedcorners.devxyn.com/shop

## Topics & Keywords

## Content Policy for AI
- All articles are original editorial content
- Product links are curated affiliate recommendations
- For latest articles, always check: https://curatedcorners.devxyn.com/feed.json

*This is a static fallback. The dynamic version with full article index is served by the server at /llms.txt*
